title: Trump threatens Iran with AI picture of himself with a gun: 'No more Mr. Nice guy!'
summary_full: Oil prices continued to rise on Wednesday after U.S. President Donald Trump appeared to threaten Iran in a TruthSocial post.
summary_public: Oil prices continued to rise on Wednesday after U.S. President Donald Trump appeared to threaten Iran in a TruthSocial post.
